creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Helge Oldach from comment #24)

Nice, that's exactly what I'm looking for!

I'm discussing this with Mark Milard at lists and there is a doubt of whether software accel will be used on rpi4 (driver scfb framebuffer).

You are using swrast. I will test laters if it makes a difference on rpi4.

Thanks!
